hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { node "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\awtrix-activate.js" } elseif ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { node "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\awtrix-activate.js" } }

if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { node "$env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\awtrix-mode-tracker.js" } elseif ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { node "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\hooks\awtrix-mode-tracker.js" } }
